name: pi-eurouter
description: EUrouter provider for pi. 127 models via API, fallback if offline.
readme:
# pi-eurouter 🇪🇺

[EUrouter](https://eurouter.ai) provider extension for [pi](https://pi.dev) (EUrouter)

## Install

### From npm (recommended)
```bash
pi install npm:pi-eurouter
```

### From GitHub
```bash
pi install git:github.com/micuintus/pi-eurouter
```

## Login

Run `/login` in pi:
1. Choose **"Use an API key"**
2. Select **"EUrouter"**
3. Paste your `eur_...` API key

## Use

Run `/model` in pi and select any model under the **eurouter** provider.

## Development

```bash
git clone https://github.com/micuintus/pi-eurouter
cd pi-eurouter
npm install
npm run typecheck
```
